title: sphaeralcea digitata subsp. tenuipes
intro: Sphaeralcea digitata subsp. tenuipes, also known as a shrubby globemallow, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Sphaeralcea digitata subsp. tenuipes include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
